channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: ‘They brought me here to kill me’ says Gaza doctor in Israeli prison
item.description: ‘They brought me here to kill me’ says Gaza doctor in Israeli prison

item.title: France’s Marine Le Pen must wear ankle tag after appeal ruling
item.description: A French appeals court upheld Marine Le Pen's conviction for misusing European Parliament funds.

item.title: Argentina stage stunning late comeback to beat Egypt in World Cup last 16
item.description: ‌Holders Argentina survive huge scare to earn a 3-2 win ⁠over Egypt and reach the World Cup quarterfinals.

item.title: SpaceX shares slide as it joins the tech-heavy Nasdaq-100
item.description: Musk-led company joined the index on Tuesday, less than a month after its stock market debut on June 12.

item.title: French far-right leader Le Pen says will run in 2027 presidential election
item.description: Her announcement followed a court ruling that reduced the length of time she was banned from holding public office.

item.title: Several hurt in Damascus blasts as Macron meets Syria’s Sharaa
item.description: Several hurt in Damascus blasts as Macron meets Syria's Sharaa

item.title: Tornadoes kill 17 in central China as Typhoon Bavi looms offshore
item.description: Severe rain and winds lash southern Guangxi and central Hubei provinces, with President Xi urging an 'all out' response.

item.title: How conflict minerals fuel war in eastern DR Congo amid US sanctions
item.description: The US has imposed sanctions on Rwandan companies it says helped finance armed groups through the illicit minerals trade

item.title: South Africans line up for jobs after exodus of foreign workers
item.description: Many South Africans are hoping to secure the jobs left vacant by the departure of foreigners

item.title: IOC lifts suspension, paves way for Russians to compete at LA 2028 Olympics
item.description: No decision yet on whether Russia may display its flag, colours or have its anthem played at ​the Games.

item.title: What happened in the first half of the Argentina vs Egypt World Cup match?
item.description: Egypt score a goal and then save a Messi penalty to keep the reigning champions at bay in Atlanta.

item.title: Switzerland vs Colombia LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16
item.description: Live coverage and text updates from our commentary stream as Switzerland play Colombia in round of 16 knockout stage.

item.title: US trade deficit surges amid artificial intelligence spending boom
item.description: Imbalance soars to $77.6bn in May as imports outpaced exports, driven by pharmaceuticals and semiconductors.

item.title: Trump says will lift sanctions on Turkiye, ‘consider’ selling F-35s
item.description: Announcement during Ankara meeting suggests pivot in US policy, despite opposition from Israel.

item.title: Christians are not united for Israel
item.description: The Christian Zionist narrative linking faith to support for Israel is deeply flawed. Evangelicals have begun to see it.

item.title: Nigel Farage resigns as MP, will run in UK by-election
item.description: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage says he will resign as an MP to trigger a by-election and stand again.

item.title: How much does playing in the World Cup pay?
item.description: How much does playing in the World Cup pay?

item.title: Netanyahu’s Christian comments ‘aimed at sowing strife’: Lebanese analysts
item.description: After Netanyahu's statements on Lebanese Christians were denounced in Lebanon, analysts call Israel's PM a liar.

item.title: Reform UK’s Farage resigns as MP amid funding scandal, forcing by-election
item.description: Nigel Farage says he's 'done nothing wrong' as parliament investigates undeclared benefits he accepted from a fraudster.

item.title: The World Cup is exposing the contradictions of national identity
item.description: Teams shaped by migration and diaspora are challenging exclusionary ideas of who belongs.

item.title: Mbappe slams racism by Paraguay’s Amarilla at World Cup: What we know
item.description: Footballers of African descent are often subjected to racist abuse on and off the pitch.

item.title: Two mothers, each certain a viral Gaza prisoner photo shows her son
item.description: Two Palestinian mothers believe a viral image of a bound Gaza detainee shows their missing son.

item.title: At least nine police officers killed in southwestern Pakistan attack
item.description: Shahid Rind, a spokesman for the Balochistan government, says 15 assailants killed in 'clearance operations'.

item.title: Displaced Gaza farmers turn to dirt near tents to grow crops
item.description: Israel has devastated 95 percent of Gaza's farms, engineering starvation and aid dependency, experts warn.

item.title: Argentina vs Egypt 3-2: FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16
item.description: Live coverage and text updates as Argentina play Egypt in the round of 16 knockout stage.
